lyrics:
VERSE 1


I wanna go running out 

Leave my heart bursting out

I wanna yell it out for you


VERSE 2

I wanna let you in

Let this new life begin

Spend every waking hour with you



PRE-CHORUS

And no matter what they say

Or the stones they throw our way

With you I know I’m safe and sound

And once the waiting’s done

And all is overcome

We’ll live our lives and leave this town



CHORUS

We’ll run away

And prove them wrong

We’ll run away

I know we’re strong

We’ll run away

And be on our own, on our own, on our own

title: A little better with you
lyrics:
VERSE 1

It’s all a little pointless, it’s all a little senseless

We’re all a little aimless, we’re all alone


It’s all a little hazy, we’re all a little crazy

Just chasing after daydreams so far from home

 

PRE-CHORUS 

But something happens when you walk my way

It’s nothing much but it’s enough to say



CHORUS

It feels a little better with you

It’s so much simpler with you

When I see that it’s me you choose

It feels a little better with you

It feels a little better with you

It’s so much simpler with you

Make me forget all these useless truths

It feels a little better with you



VERSE 2


The time we had was wasted, the dreams we had have faded

We’re now a little jaded, there’s no disguise

Time is slowly passing, nothing’s everlasting

Digging for some meaning beneath the lies

title: Chain
lyrics:
Am I chain to you?
Or you chain to me?
Is this a game for you?
Or you dance for me?

Have I changed for you?
Did you change me?
Is this a game fo two?
Will I stand me?

Oooooooooo

                Fm                    G

                 Cm                  Ab

                  Fm                G

                  Cm                Ab

              Fm             G
Will I stand me?

Cm             Ab              Fm             G
Oooooooooo

title: Dream with me
lyrics:
VERSE 1

Every sound I hear

Feels like a lullaby

Close my eyes

And there I see a starry sky


PRE-CHORUS

Breathing’s getting slower

And I’m drifting even deeper 

All worries gone

It’s out of my control 

And I just wanted you to know

My only hope



CHORUS

I hope it’s you I see

Come dream with me

I hope it’s you I meet

Come dream with me

title: Get Gone
lyrics:
VERSE 1

You are all that I have ever dreamed of love

And I don’t ever want to have to see us part



PRE-CHORUS

You tell me that you love me

But you’re never really here

So let’s be done

And I don’t want to be here when you tell me that you’re leaving

So just get gone


CHORUS

Get gone

Get gone, gone, gone

Get gone, gone, gone

Get gone, gone, gone

title: Lalala
lyrics:
Me dá um parabéns 
Quando eu te sigo sem pensar
Me dá um muito bem
Quando te agrado sem falhar 
Me dá um bom trabalho
Quando eu me calo

Ponte
Dá um like que eu gosto
Coração preenchido
Pela pose que eu posto
Meu sorriso tingido
Melhor nem comentar
Que pode dar em conversa
Sobre o peito que arde
E é perigoso entrar nessa

Refrão
Hum e vamos lá pro lalala
Pula pra parte boa
Vira o disco e vai cantar
Hum vamos la pro lalala
Pensar é coisa boba
É melhor deixar pra lalalala

Verso 2
Amigo a gente compra
Se agente sente sem falar
Um jóia a gte manda
Pra quem se encaixa sem ousar
Abraço a gte ganha
Depois q a gente apanha
chords_text:

Me dá um parabéns 
Quando eu te sigo sem pensar
Me dá um muito bem
Quando te agrado sem falhar 
Me dá um bom trabalho
Quando eu me calo



Ponte (Gm Bb Eb D7)

Dá um like que eu gosto
Coração preenchido
Pela pose que eu posto
Meu sorriso tingido
Melhor nem comentar
Que pode dar em conversa
Sobre o peito que arde
E é perigoso entrar nessa

Amigo a gente compra

Depois q a gente apanha

Pula pra parte boa
Vira o disco e vai cantar
Hum vamos la pro lalala
Pensar é coisa boba
É melhor deixar pra lalalala

title: Meant to be
lyrics:
VERSE 1

You’re always thinking, over analyzing, multitasking life

I’m always planning, procrastinating, losing track of time


CHORUS

But we fit so ooooo perfectly

We are so ooooo meant to be


VERSE 2

You’re always joking and patronizing

Afraid to face your fears

I’m always wishing, exaggerating

Afraid to show my tears

title: Move on
lyrics:
VERSE 1

Working thesis, broken pieces

Words misplaced and thoughts unheard

Round in circles, chasing tails

Wounds uncovered, games that hurt



PRE-CHORUS

You’re always right I’m never wrong 

Our worlds collide

When you speak up, I sing a song

All peace subsides

Then you forget and I pretend

And to get along, we move on


CHORUS

We hold on to you and I

We hold on to you and I

We hold on to you and

To get along, we move on, we move on

title: My mind wanders
lyrics:
VERSE 1

Sunny day and I'm indoors

'Cause it’s so hard to get up

Every breath’s a battle

Every day’s a new start



PRE-CHORUS 
      
I’m missing something

And I just don’t know what

I’m missing someone

But I am all I’ve got



CHORUS 

So my mind wanders

My mind wanders

My mind wanders

And still I’m just as lost


VERSE 2

Same old thoughts running round

As I lay in my bed

Recreating, replaying
All the noise in my head

Everything that everyone has ever one day said to me

Everyday I ever lived and never did succeed

Anything that anyone has ever one day done to me

The wants that never fade just go on endlessly

I wake and weave a web of woes ever so willingly

Will I ever learn to let go, will I ever let me be

title: No more
lyrics:
VERSE 1

I don’t want no more trouble any more

I don’t want histeria knocking at my door

I’m searching for silence, looking for my own sanity

You’re looking for more, but there’s no more that I can give


VERSE 2

I don’t want no more drama anymore

I don’t need your burdens to come rushing through my door

I’m searching for silence looking for my own sanity

You’re looking for more, but there’s no more that I can give

I don’t want to carry you on anymore

pa pa pa pa pa….


CHORUS

There’s no more that I can give

There’s no more that I can give 

There’s no, no more that I can give

You’re looking for more but there’s no more that I can give

VERSE 3 

I don’t want to carry you on anymore

I don’t need your sorrows to be spilled over my floor

I’m searching for silence, looking for my own sanity

You’re looking for more, but there’s no more that I can give

title: Not Alone
lyrics:
VERSE 1

Real, all you needed to be was real

Here, all you needed to be was here

Laugh, all you needed to do was laugh at life

Fight, all you needed to do was fight for life



PRE-CHORUS

But you chose your excuses

You chose short-sighted gain

You chose all your weaknesses

Now all that’s left is blame

But you can’t stay the same



CHORUS

So get up, out of that rut

There’s still time to change

Go on and move on

Gather your pride, come into the light

It’s a new day, you’re not alone now

You’re not alone now, not alone now




BRIDGE

Get up, rise up

Stand up make up for it all now

Get up, rise up

Stand up, you can face it all now

title: Part of me
lyrics:
VERSE 1

Waking up tired just like I did before

A new day rises as I fall

Into the old ways

Into the old ways


VERSE 2

An endless race, a faceless enemy

Clock strikes ten, I start again

I plan the countdown restlessly and now I see 

That it has no end

That it has no end



CHORUS

It’s just a part of me

So I’ll just let it be

It’s just a part of me

So I’ll just wake up and then

Start again



VERSE 3

New place, new town, new life and still no change

All the same mistakes, same old complaints

Here come the old ways

Right back to the old ways


(CHORURS)


BRIDGE (D - E - F#m)

I'm trying to change, trying know

Who I am, trying to grow

Wanna play a new part

But never know how to start

title: Pra quê?
lyrics:
VERSO 1

Não questione, não ouse agir nem pensar

Não procure, não olhe, pra quê provocar?

Não duvide, obedeça, inovar é errar

Temos toda certeza, pra quê perguntar?



REFRÃO 1

Pra quê se perder se você pode seguir?

Pra quê liberdade, aonde você quer ir?

Pra quê ter voz se só precisa ouvir?

Aonde pensa que vai o seu lugar é aqui


VERSO 2

Não recordo, não lembro por quê tanto fiquei

Será que achava incerto o que havia além

Das portas fechadas que por fim eu abri?

Não se sabe de nada é o que descobri




REFRÃO 2

Vou correr me perder, sem caminho a seguir

Quero liberdade pra pensar e sentir

Eu tenho voz, você vai ter que me ouvir

Não sei pra onde vou, mas é pra longe daqui

title: Remember
lyrics:
VERSE 1

You’re writing a new page

It’s a whole new stage, so much has changed

The life you wrote in ink

Now memories paper thin

Don’t let them sink



CHORUS

Remember how we felt

Every word we said

Remember where we’ve been and where we thought that we would be

Remember what we lost

And everything we learned

Remember every thrill and every time that we got burnt

We must remember

We must remember

We must remember


We’re starting a new age

Another daunting phase

So much will change

The life that we once lead

Now memories in our heads

Will we forget?

title: Room for you
lyrics:
VERSE 1

Spill out your sorrows

Pour me your woes

Pile on your worries

Like I don’t have enough of those


VERSE 2

Tell me I’m distant

Tell me I’m cold

Tell me I’m selfish 

Isn’t that just how it goes?



CHORUS

Maybe some other day

I’ll find the right words to say

Maybe I’ll find a way to make room for you

Maybe some other time

I’ll finally keep you in mind

Maybe I’ll find a way to make room for you
VERSE 3

Stain every memory

Twist every word

Cry out to the skies 

Like you’re the only one who’s ever hurt

title: Smoke and mirrors
lyrics:
VERSE 1

Smoke and mirrors, light effects

Is that what love is?

Magic potions, side effects

Is that what love is?



PRE-CHORUS

Do I love or do I hate?

Do I even know the difference?

Am I in love under a spell?

Am I awake?

How can I tell?


VERSE 2

Going under, there’s no pain

But when I surface, life’s in flames

What is truth and what is dream?

Am I blind or just unseen?

title: Stay
lyrics:
VERSE 1

You look at me and I look away

We must pretend not to feel this way
	  
They can’t undo what’s already done

Only time will tell what we will become



CHORUS  

And all I ask is that you stay
      
And all I ask is that you stay


VERSE 2

Our minds are one but we’re miles away

A heavy load but it’s worth the wait

Cause we both know that it's only time

Only time against you and I

title: They Say
lyrics:
VERSE 1

No more doubts and no more questions

No more buts no search for answers

The more I search the less I find

I’m leaving the wild chase far behind



CHORUS

They say I’m lost, but I’m soaring high

They think I’m crazy, but this life’s just mine

They say it’s dangerous to live so free

But I’m living life and that’s enough for me


VERSE 2

No more reasoning, no more searching

Just keep living, keep on working

The less I look, the more I find

That it’s all a mystery and that’s just fine

title: Time
lyrics:
VERSE 1

I don’t need no diamond rings

What’s the use in shiny things

I don’t need a house of gold

Wouldn't care for the world



CHORUS

It’s time I need

Just you and me

It’s time I need

Just you and me

Just you and me



VERSE 2

To have or to be, no need to ask

Just give me your all is all I ask

Make room for me and I am yours

That’s worth so much more than a pot of gold

title: Verde da Janela
lyrics:
Verde da janela
Verde da janela
Beijo a luz de vela
Ceu de brigadeiro
Chuva de janeiro
O sol batendo na parede 
Aquece o pé
deitada aqui na rede
E vem
Aquela paz, 
foge não 

Pele no gramado
Pescoço perfumado
Laço de menina
Gota de neblina
O vento arrasta a agonia
Acende o ceu 
Seu toque toca a melodia
Vem rapaz
Foge não 

Como faço 
Pra ficar no abraço
Nesse espaço tão fugaz
Não, não vá, volta atrás 

Ah vontade
De não ter saudade
E deitar sempre nessa paz
Foge não, quero mais, vem rapaz, volta paz

title: Where do I go?
lyrics:
VERSE 1

Another year's gone by 

And now it's time for change

It's time to move it's time to grow

I just can't stay the same



CHORUS

Will someone tell me where to go from here

Can somebody tell me where the hell do I go from here



VERSE 2

I can't seem to find my way

Am I the only one?

Time's running out, I'm missing out

What is there to be done?
